name: Cinnamon-Apple Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan and set aside until ready to use.
3. Peel and coarsely chop the apples.
4. In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat the egg whites for 30 seconds.
5. Add the lemon juice, maple syrup, and vanilla and beat for one more minute.
6. Stir in the applesauce.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
8. Fold the apples into the batter.
9. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan and bake in the preheated oven for 50-60 minutes or until the center springs back when gently pressed.
10. Remove the squares from the oven and set on a wire rack to cool.
11. Slice into 16 squares and cover with foil until ready to serve. This cake tastes best on the second day.
